questions.question: In what year did Elon Musk found the space technology company SpaceX?
questions.explanation: The material states, 'In 2002, Musk founded the space technology company SpaceX, becoming its CEO and chief engineer.'

questions.question: Elon Musk acquired Twitter in 2022 and subsequently rebranded it. What was the new name given to the social network in 2023?
questions.explanation: The text mentions, 'In 2022, he acquired the social network Twitter, implementing significant changes, and rebranding it as X in 2023.'

questions.question: From which university did Elon Musk receive his bachelor's degrees in physics and economics?
questions.explanation: The material states that he received 'a Bachelor of Arts in physics and a Bachelor of Science in economics from the University of Pennsylvania's Wharton School' in 1997.

questions.question: In what year did Elon Musk become an American citizen?
questions.explanation: The text states, 'Musk also became an American citizen in 2002.'

questions.question: Which online payment company, co-founded by Elon Musk after the sale of Zip2, later merged to form PayPal?
questions.explanation: Following its sale in 1999, he co-founded X.com, an online payment company that later merged to form PayPal.

questions.question: What primary role did Elon Musk serve in the Trump administration in early 2025?
options: Senior Advisor to the President and de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)
questions.explanation: The material states, 'Musk served as Senior Advisor to the President and as the de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).'

questions.question: According to the provided material, since what year has Elon Musk been estimated as the wealthiest person in the world?
questions.explanation: The text mentions, 'Musk has been the wealthiest person in the world since 2025'.

questions.question: Where was Elon Musk's mother, Maye (née Haldeman), born?
questions.explanation: His mother, Maye (née Haldeman), is a model and dietitian born in Saskatchewan, Canada.

questions.question: What was the main reason Elon Musk left OpenAI and subsequently established xAI?
options: He wanted to retire from AI research.
He was recruited by another AI company.
Growing discontent with OpenAI's direction and leadership in the AI boom.
questions.explanation: The text states, 'growing discontent with the organization's direction and their leadership in the AI boom in the 2020s led him to establish xAI'.

questions.question: What was the name of the software company Elon Musk co-founded in 1995?
questions.explanation: In 1995, Musk co-founded the software company Zip2.
